articles.title: Finance Briefing: Oil Prices Drop 4% Amid Trump’s Iran Dialogue, Inflation Pressures, and Market Resilience
articles.summary: Oil prices slipped more than 4% after former President Trump signaled constructive progress in Iran talks, while consumer inflation remains a concern and dividend-paying stocks attract steady‑income seekers. Market participants weigh Fed policy shifts, debt burdens, and the resilience of the S&P 500.
articles.imageAlt: Image from source article for Oil prices fall more than 4% after Trump says Iran talks proceeding in a 'constructive manner'
articles.imageSourceTitle: Oil prices fall more than 4% after Trump says Iran talks proceeding in a 'constructive manner'

articles.title: Technology Briefing: The Download, Steroid Olympics, and AI‑Driven Science
articles.summary: The latest wave of AI integration is reshaping coding, scientific research, and longevity tech, while climate firms pivot toward critical minerals. This briefing examines platform shifts, cloud economics, security implications, and operational strategies driving these trends.

articles.imageSourceTitle: The Download: coding’s future, the ‘Steroid Olympics,’ and AI-driven science

articles.title: Finance Briefing: Inflation’s Grip Persists into the Holiday Weekend and Its Ripple Effects on Markets
articles.summary: The latest data shows that inflationary pressures remain stubbornly high as Americans head into the Memorial Day weekend, with price increases most pronounced in food, fuel, and household goods.
